value.string: Author, Description and Change History Section
This bot does CRUD Operationg on a table with Bulk insert and update.
Folder location for SP_Output table storage

value.expression: Select COLUMN_NAME from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS where TABLE_NAME='$i_TableName$' and Ordinal_position>3

variables.description: Holds database credentials and some other configurations. Refer this bot's manual document
variables.name: i_Config

variables.description: This holds whether the DB Connectivity is up or not

variables.description: Provide get, insert, update and delete query statement.

variables.description: It is the table name where insert and update will be made. Use in bulk update/insert  and update data provided in an input data table which schema is same as database table schema
variables.name: i_TableName

variables.description: Holds data which to be inserted/updated to table
variables.name: i_InputTable

variables.description: A variable you can use for assignments
variables.name: prompt-assignment

variables.description: It is the key column by which update will be made.
variables.name: i_KeyName

variables.description: Holds all columns which will be updated by column separator ( â ).
variables.name: i_UpdateColumns

variables.description: Root directory for creating bot logs - can be customized or left as default
variables.name: sRootLogDirectory

variables.description: When using SP then provide this value
variables.name: i_spName

variables.name: i_spParams
